deep_dive.title: Addressing Detail Bottlenecks in Latent Diffusion for RGB-to-SWIR Image Translation
deep_dive.abstract: Latent diffusion models (LDMs) enable efficient image-to-image translation but discard fine spatial details during compression, degrading downstream perception tasks. We identify two bottlenecks: the autoencoder, which loses spatial information, and the conditioning pathway, which further degrades the source signal through naive downsampling. We propose two lightweight, backbone-agnostic fixes: a Source-Conditioned Autoencoder (SCAE) that injects high-resolution source features into the decoder via skip connections, and a Learnable Guidance Encoder (LGE) that replaces naive downsampling with a learned conditioning signal. Evaluated on RGB-to-SWIR translation for driving scenes with two denoiser backbones (U-Net and DiT), our approach improves detection mAP by up to 2x over the latent diffusion baseline, with up to 3.4x gains on small objects (COCO-small, <32^2 px^2), while achieving state-of-the-art FID. We further show that FID and detection performance are poorly correlated, motivating multi-axis evaluation. Results generalise zero-shot to the public RASMD benchmark. We will publicly release test data with annotations, all checkpoints, and training code.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Latent diffusion model detail bottleneck analysis
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 潜在扩散模型细节瓶颈分析
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 潜在扩散模型细节瓶颈分析
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 潜在扩散模型细节瓶颈分析
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Latent diffusion models lose fine spatial details during compression; proposes Source-Conditioned Autoencoder and Learnable Guidance Encoder to improve detail preservation for image translation.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文指出潜在扩散模型在压缩过程中会丢失精细空间细节，导致下游感知任务性能下降。作者识别出两个瓶颈：自编码器和条件通路。为此提出两种轻量级、与骨干无关的改进：源条件自编码器通过跳跃连接将高分辨率源特征注入解码器；可学习引导编码器用学习到的条件信号替代朴素下采样。在驾驶场景的RGB到SWIR翻译任务上，使用U-Net和DiT两种去噪骨干，该方法有效提升了细节保真度，验证了改进的通用性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文指出潜在扩散模型在压缩过程中会丢失精细空间细节，导致下游感知任务性能下降。作者识别出两个瓶颈：自编码器和条件通路。为此提出两种轻量级、与骨干无关的改进：源条件自编码器通过跳跃连接将高分辨率源特征注入解码器；可学习引导编码器用学习到的条件信号替代朴素下采样。在驾驶场景的RGB到SWIR翻译任务上，使用U-Net和DiT两种去噪骨干，该方法有效提升了细节保真度，验证了改进的通用性。

deep_dive.title: Squeeze-Release: Iterative Pruning with Exact Structural Minimization
deep_dive.abstract: Unstructured pruning produces sparse weight tensors, but the standard implementation keeps tensor shapes unchanged so the deployed model is no smaller than before pruning. We present an exact structural rewrite, which we call minimization, that converts a masked network into a smaller dense network with the same forward function up to floating-point rounding. The Squeeze-Release cycle iterates pruning and minimization with an intermediate release step that re-enables the exact-zero positions inside the compacted tensors as small calibrated noise, turning otherwise wasted capacity back into trainable parameters. Successive cycles use that capacity to find structural redundancy a single pass cannot reach. We additionally introduce CompensatedLayerNorm, a function-preserving replacement for LayerNorm that extends minimization to channel reduction across LayerNorm-equipped residual streams. Squeeze-Release compresses the deployable network to 39x smaller than the unpruned model on a fully-connected model network and 14.8x smaller on modern CNN (ConvNeXt-Tiny), at comparable accuracy. In addition we prove that the rewrite can be extended to transformer architectures.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Iterative pruning with exact structural minimization for model compression
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 迭代剪枝与精确结构最小化用于模型压缩
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 迭代剪枝与精确结构最小化用于模型压缩
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 迭代剪枝与精确结构最小化用于模型压缩
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes Squeeze-Release cycle: exact structural minimization converts masked network to smaller dense net, with release step adding noise to reused capacity for further pruning.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出Squeeze-Release循环，通过精确结构最小化将带掩码网络转换为更小的稠密网络，并引入释放步骤将精确零位置重新激活为小校准噪声，将浪费容量转为可训练参数。多次循环能发现单次剪枝无法达到的结构冗余。同时提出CompensatedLayerNorm。该方法可直接应用于视频压缩模型的剪枝加速，实现轻量化部署。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出Squeeze-Release循环，通过精确结构最小化将带掩码网络转换为更小的稠密网络，并引入释放步骤将精确零位置重新激活为小校准噪声，将浪费容量转为可训练参数。多次循环能发现单次剪枝无法达到的结构冗余。同时提出CompensatedLayerNorm。该方法可直接应用于视频压缩模型的剪枝加速，实现轻量化部署。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: model pruning methods for lightweight video codecs

deep_dive.title: Triangular Consistency as a Universal Constraint for Learning Optical Flow
deep_dive.abstract: We propose triangular consistency as a first-principled constraint for optical flow, which is agnostic to network architecture, supervision type, and dataset, and applies to both image-pair and multi-frame settings. This simple but powerful constraint is to compose two flows to induce a third flow and enforce consistency among the three. The composed flows may arise from (i) image pairs, yielding cycle consistency; (ii) multiple video frames, producing longer-range motion through temporal chaining; or (iii) image pairs combined with controlled synthetic transformations, which becomes data augmentation. This triangular consistency introduces negligible computational overhead and requires no additional annotations. Since it is derived directly from the geometry of optical flow, it does not rely on model-specific assumptions and serves as a ``universal'' plug-and-play component for optical flow training. Experiments show consistent improvement across supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning settings.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: proposes triangular consistency constraint for optical flow learning, directly applicable to joint motion estimation and compression in video codecs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出三角一致性约束用于光流学习，可直接应用于视频编解码中运动估计与压缩的联合训练
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出三角一致性约束用于光流学习，可直接应用于视频编解码中运动估计与压缩的联合训练
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出三角一致性约束用于光流学习，可直接应用于视频编解码中运动估计与压缩的联合训练
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Triangular consistency is proposed as a novel constraint for optical flow that works across architectures and supervision types, enabling unsupervised and multi-frame consistency, with potential to improve motion estimation in video compression.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有光流学习缺乏通用约束，本文提出三角一致性约束，通过组合两个流诱导第三个流并强制一致性，适用于多种监督和框架。该方法无需额外标注，可提升视频压缩中运动估计的精度和稳定性，为联合学习运动估计与压缩提供新工具。

quick_skim.title: VideoWeave: Unlocking Geometric Consistency in Video Generation via Joint Geometry-Video Modeling
quick_skim.abstract: Large-scale video diffusion models often fail to preserve 3D structure over time, causing geometric drift and implausible motion under viewpoint changes. Existing methods usually enforce geometric consistency by using explicit geometry reconstructions, such as depth maps, point clouds, or reconstructed 3D structures, to define conditions, supervision, or reward signals, making the generator sensitive to errors from upstream geometry pipelines. We propose VideoWeave, a latent-space post-training framework that uses implicit geometry-model features to constrain the generative distribution, providing a more flexible and non-rigid form of guidance that mitigates the impact of reconstruction errors from geometry models. Specifically, VideoWeave adapts these features into geometry latents and jointly models them with video latents in a shared denoising space, allowing geometry to shape the generative distribution during training. To support this process, we build GeoVid-80K, an 80K-video dataset with paired appearance and geometry representations. Experiments on text-to-video and image-to-video generation show that VideoWeave improves geometric coherence while preserving strong visual quality. VideoWeave project page at https://videoweave.github.io/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: latent-space video diffusion for geometric consistency
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 隐空间视频扩散模型实现几何一致性
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 隐空间视频扩散模型实现几何一致性
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 隐空间视频扩散模型实现几何一致性
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: VideoWeave proposes a latent-space post-training framework that uses implicit geometry model features to constrain video diffusion, improving geometric consistency without explicit 3D reconstruction.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: VideoWeave提出一种隐空间后训练框架，利用隐式几何模型特征约束视频扩散模型的生成分布，在不依赖显式3D重建的情况下提升几何一致性。该方法通过隐式几何引导缓解了上游几何模型误差的影响，为生成式视频编码中的扩散模型应用提供了新思路。实验表明该方法在保持视频质量的同时显著减少了几何漂移。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: VideoWeave提出一种隐空间后训练框架，利用隐式几何模型特征约束视频扩散模型的生成分布，在不依赖显式3D重建的情况下提升几何一致性。该方法通过隐式几何引导缓解了上游几何模型误差的影响，为生成式视频编码中的扩散模型应用提供了新思路。实验表明该方法在保持视频质量的同时显著减少了几何漂移。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 调研扩散模型、生成式先验与视频编解码融合方案，挖掘感知质量、语义编码、生成式预测的创新研究点。调研深度学习运动估计、光流、运动补偿与编解码联合训练策略，总结帧间预测模块的网络设计与优化方法。, especially work that connects or combines: Scalable NVC; Joint learning of motion estimation and compression for video codec; Latent diffusion; Generative video compression; end-to-end learned video compression frameworks; inter-frame prediction network design and optimization; Neural motion compensation module in end to end video compression; Perceptual rate distortion optimization for generative video coding; Diffusion model based end to end video compression method.

quick_skim.title: Temporal Difference Learning for Diffusion Models
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion models are typically trained with objectives that focus on local denoising targets at individual time steps (or adjacent pairs), which do not enforce consistency between predictions along the denoising trajectory. This lack of cross-time consistency can degrade performance, especially for few-step samplers. We introduce a temporal difference (TD) objective that penalizes inconsistency of the model's multi-step progress along the denoising path. By reformulating the diffusion process as a Markov reward process and casting denoising as a policy evaluation problem in reinforcement learning, we derive a unified TD approach that applies to both discrete- and continuous-time diffusion formulations. We further propose a principled sample-based reweighting method that stabilizes training. Empirically, we show that using our TD training can significantly improve sample quality measured by FID, with stronger advantages when the number of sampling steps is small, highlighting its practical utility under low-computation-budget scenarios. We provide ablation studies to justify our design choices, including pairwise loss reweighting, regularization weight, and one-step stride. Overall, our TD approach can be a general drop-in that enforces cross-time consistency and improves generation quality across different diffusion generative models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: temporal difference learning improves diffusion models, applicable to diffusion-based video compression
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 时间差分学习改进扩散模型训练，可应用于基于扩散的视频压缩
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 时间差分学习改进扩散模型训练，可应用于基于扩散的视频压缩
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 时间差分学习改进扩散模型训练，可应用于基于扩散的视频压缩
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces temporal difference (TD) objective for diffusion models, enforcing cross-time consistency and improving few-step sampling quality.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对扩散模型训练中缺乏跨时间步一致性的问题，提出时间差分(TD)学习目标，将去噪过程重新表述为马尔可夫奖励过程，利用TD误差惩罚多步预测的不一致性。该方法适用于离散和连续时间扩散公式，并提出了基于样本的重加权策略。实验证明TD训练显著提升了少步采样器的性能，为扩散模型在视频压缩中的高效应用提供了新的训练范式。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对扩散模型训练中缺乏跨时间步一致性的问题，提出时间差分(TD)学习目标，将去噪过程重新表述为马尔可夫奖励过程，利用TD误差惩罚多步预测的不一致性。该方法适用于离散和连续时间扩散公式，并提出了基于样本的重加权策略。实验证明TD训练显著提升了少步采样器的性能，为扩散模型在视频压缩中的高效应用提供了新的训练范式。

quick_skim.title: Variable-Rate Deep Image Compression based on Low-Rank Adaptation by Progressive Learning
quick_skim.abstract: In the digital age, image compression is crucial for numerous applications, including web media, streaming services, high-resolution medical imaging, and connected vehicle networks, enabling efficient data storage and transmission. With the increasing demand for high-quality image communication, the need for advanced compression techniques becomes increasingly critical. Numerous Deep Image Compression (DIC) techniques have recently been introduced, showing impressive performance compared to traditional standards. However, variable-rate image compression remains an unresolved issue. Specific DIC methods deploy multiple networks to attain different compression rates, whereas others use a single model, which often results in higher computational complexity and reduced performance. This work proposes a progressive learning approach for variable-rate image compression based on the parameter-efficient fine-tuning method, the Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). We introduce an additional LoRA Rate-Adaptive Module (LoRAM) in DIC methods. Due to the re-parameterized merging of LoRA, our proposed method does not introduce additional computational complexity during inference. Compared to methods utilizing multiple models, comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive performance, saving 99\% in parameter storage, 90% in datasets, and 97% in training steps.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Variable-rate deep image compression using low-rank adaptation and progressive learning, transferable to video codec
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用低秩适应和渐进学习的可变率深度图像压缩，可迁移至视频编码
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用低秩适应和渐进学习的可变率深度图像压缩，可迁移至视频编码
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用低秩适应和渐进学习的可变率深度图像压缩，可迁移至视频编码
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a variable-rate DIC method using low-rank adaptation via progressive learning, achieving multiple rates with single model.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有深度图像压缩方法难以实现可变率压缩，要么使用多网络，要么单模型性能次优。该工作提出基于低秩适应的渐进学习方案，通过单一模型即可支持多种压缩率，并在率失真性能上超越传统标准。该方法启发了视频编码中训练策略的改进，特别是多阶段训练和参数高效微调。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有深度图像压缩方法难以实现可变率压缩，要么使用多网络，要么单模型性能次优。该工作提出基于低秩适应的渐进学习方案，通过单一模型即可支持多种压缩率，并在率失真性能上超越传统标准。该方法启发了视频编码中训练策略的改进，特别是多阶段训练和参数高效微调。

quick_skim.title: From Compression to Deployment: Real-Time and Energy-Efficient FastGRNN on Ultra-Constrained Microcontrollers
quick_skim.abstract: The dominant trajectory of modern machine learning has been to scale up: larger models, larger accelerators, larger memory budgets. Yet a multi-year global semiconductor supply constraint and the growing energy and carbon cost of always-online inference expose the fragility of this trajectory and motivate the opposite direction: refactoring AI and ML algorithms to fit the small, ubiquitous microcontrollers already in mass production in wearables, sensors, and edge appliances. We present an end-to-end open-source reproduction of FastGRNN, a compact gated recurrent cell, deployed on two bare-metal targets: the 8-bit Arduino (ATmega328P) and the 16-bit MSP430 (no hardware multiplier; 16 KB Flash; 512 B SRAM). Our compression pipeline combines low-rank weight factorization, iterative hard-thresholding sparsity, and per-tensor Q15 post-training quantization with explicit activation calibration. The deployed model occupies 566 bytes of weights and achieves macro F1 = 0.918 (seed 0; five-seed Q15 mean 0.853+-0.107) on the HAPT test set. It matches a PyTorch reference at 100% prediction agreement across 3,399 test windows (MCU seed 0; 99.91-100% C-equivalent across five seeds). Both platforms sustain real-time 50 Hz streaming inference (9.21 ms per sample on Arduino; 13 ms on MSP430), where a 256-entry sigmoid/tanh look-up table delivers a 30.5x speedup on the multiplier-less MSP430. Four contributions extend the original FastGRNN paper: (i) cross-platform bit-equivalent deterministic inference; (ii) characterization of recurrent warm-up latency (median 74 samples, 1.48 s; worst-case 125 samples, 2.50 s over 100 test windows); (iii) a deployable look-up-table recipe for multiplier-less embedded targets; and (iv) hardware energy characterization showing 17.7 mW active inference power, <0.09 mW idle power, and 96.7% energy reduction with the LUT.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 低复杂度编解码器在微控制器上的部署
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 低复杂度编解码器在微控制器上的部署
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 低复杂度编解码器在微控制器上的部署
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper reproduces FastGRNN, a compact recurrent cell, on 8-bit and 16-bit microcontrollers with extreme resource constraints (16KB Flash, 512B SRAM), achieving real-time and energy-efficient inference, demonstrating feasibility for ultra-constrained edge devices.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现代机器学习追求大规模模型，但半导体供应限制和能耗问题促使模型向小型微控制器迁移。本文在8位和16位微控制器（无硬件乘法器、16KB闪存、512B SRAM）上完整复现并部署了紧凑型循环单元FastGRNN。通过极致的优化，实现了实时且节能的推理，证明了在超受限设备上运行神经网络的可能性，为低复杂度编解码器的端侧部署提供了参考。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现代机器学习追求大规模模型，但半导体供应限制和能耗问题促使模型向小型微控制器迁移。本文在8位和16位微控制器（无硬件乘法器、16KB闪存、512B SRAM）上完整复现并部署了紧凑型循环单元FastGRNN。通过极致的优化，实现了实时且节能的推理，证明了在超受限设备上运行神经网络的可能性，为低复杂度编解码器的端侧部署提供了参考。

quick_skim.title: Renderable Partial Representations for Dynamic Gaussian Splatting under Incomplete Delivery
quick_skim.abstract: Dynamic Gaussian compression is normally optimized for complete files or complete progressive prefixes, but interactive rendering encounters partial representations: some spatiotemporal regions are present, others missing, and late refinements cannot affect the displayed frame. We study dynamic Gaussian representations whose incomplete delivery states remain directly renderable and whose degradation is optimized in image space. Gaussian primitives are organized into independently addressable spatiotemporal clusters with a base level and three refinements; training samples partial dependency graphs, renders many counterfactual states in one GPU batch, and minimizes expected distortion, tail distortion, temporal inconsistency, rate, and prefix regressions. A counterfactual utility layer measures the marginal render contribution of each completion group across valid receiver contexts. The same graph admits a concrete delivery realization with MTU-bounded entropy-coded chunks, deadline-aware scheduling, and receiver-side dependency closure. On held-out views, the finest refinement has negative mean marginal utility in 3/32 D-NeRF bouncingballs, 49/64 HyperNeRF broom2, and 28/64 HyperNeRF chicken clusters; its lower-tail utility is negative in 21/32, 61/64, and 42/64 clusters, respectively. On broom2, render-utility ordering removes both PSNR regressions produced by nominal layer order at matched byte budgets; on chicken, utilities measured on disjoint training cameras improve held-out PSNR by 3.03 dB at the lowest matched budget. These scoped results show why nominal refinement order cannot substitute for render-conditioned utility: the formulation treats network delivery as a distribution over renderable scene states rather than as an external wrapper around a graphics codec.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Dynamic Gaussian compression with partial delivery and rate-distortion optimization
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 动态高斯压缩与部分传输和率失真优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 动态高斯压缩与部分传输和率失真优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 动态高斯压缩与部分传输和率失真优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Studies dynamic Gaussian representations optimized for incomplete delivery states, using spatiotemporal clusters and multi-refinement training to minimize distortion and rate.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究动态高斯表示在不完全传输状态下的可渲染性，将高斯原语组织为独立可寻址的时空集群，训练时采样部分依赖图并批量渲染反事实状态，优化期望失真、尾部失真、时间不一致性和码率。方法适用于实时交互渲染场景，与神经视频编码中率失真优化和可扩展表示有密切联系。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文研究动态高斯表示在不完全传输状态下的可渲染性，将高斯原语组织为独立可寻址的时空集群，训练时采样部分依赖图并批量渲染反事实状态，优化期望失真、尾部失真、时间不一致性和码率。方法适用于实时交互渲染场景，与神经视频编码中率失真优化和可扩展表示有密切联系。

quick_skim.title: SpectralDiT: Timestep-Conditioned Spectral Residual Correction for Flow-Matching DiTs
quick_skim.abstract: We propose SpectralDiT, a lightweight modification to flow-matching Diffusion Transformers that adds timestep-conditioned spectral correction to the MLP residual branch. The module decomposes each residual update into low- and high-frequency components on the patch-token grid, then learns a zero-initialized additive gate so the model initially matches the baseline DiT. On CIFAR-10 pixel-space generation, SpectralDiT improves FID from 20.78 to 19.71 at patch size 1 and reduces the radial Fourier spectrum gap. Furthermore, we scale our method to latent diffusion on ImageNet-100. With 0.6% additional theoretical FLOPs and 1.36% additional parameters, SpectralDiT improves latent flow-matching, achieving an 8.7% relative FID reduction under classifier-free guidance (CFG 2.0). All reported results are averaged over five seeds. Ablations and gate visualizations on CIFAR-10 reveal stable block-specific spectral correction patterns.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: improves latent diffusion models by spectral residual correction, enhancing generation quality with minimal overhead
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 通过谱残差校正改进潜在扩散模型，以极小开销提升生成质量
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 通过谱残差校正改进潜在扩散模型，以极小开销提升生成质量
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 通过谱残差校正改进潜在扩散模型，以极小开销提升生成质量
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: SpectralDiT introduces timestep-conditioned spectral correction to flow-matching DiTs, improving FID on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet-100 latent diffusion with negligible extra cost.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 潜在扩散模型在生成质量上仍有提升空间。本文SpectralDiT在流匹配扩散Transformer的残差分支中加入时序条件谱校正，分解高低频分量并学习门控信号。在CIFAR-10和ImageNet-100上，FID显著降低，仅增加0.6%FLOPs。该方法为提升扩散模型生成能力提供了轻量级方案，可迁移至其他扩散架构。

quick_skim.title: Pulse: Training Acceleration for Large Diffusion Models with Automatic Pipeline Parallelism
quick_skim.abstract: Diffusion models are now a dominant approach for high-fidelity image and video generation, yet scaling their training across GPU clusters remains challenging. Unlike transformer-only architectures, diffusion backbones commonly adopt UNet-style encoder-decoder structures with heterogeneous layers and long-range skip connections. Under conventional pipeline parallelism, these non-local dependencies force large skip activations and their gradients to traverse multiple pipeline boundaries, making peer-to-peer (P2P) communication a dominant bottleneck and substantially reducing pipeline efficiency. In this paper, we present PULSE, an automatic pipeline-parallel training strategy that makes skip locality a first-class optimization objective. PULSE eliminates skip-induced communication by collocating skip-connected encoder-decoder layers on the same device and caching skip activations locally for later use in backpropagation. To realize this placement while maintaining high pipeline utilization, PULSE co-designs: (1) a skip-aware dynamic-programming partitioner that balances heterogeneous stage workloads under symmetric collocation constraints, (2) an ILP-based schedule synthesizer that generates bubble-efficient wave schedules for the resulting stage-to-device mapping, and (3) a hybrid parallelism tuner that selects pipeline/data-parallel degrees and microbatch sizes under memory and network constraints. Our extensive experiments show that the volume of communication can be reduced by 89 percent, and the training throughput can be increased by up to 2.3x on communication-bound hardware, compared with state-of-the-art parallelism strategies.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: training acceleration for large diffusion models with pipeline parallelism
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 大扩散模型的流水线并行训练加速
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 大扩散模型的流水线并行训练加速
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 大扩散模型的流水线并行训练加速
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Presents PULSE, an automatic pipeline-parallel training strategy for diffusion models that optimizes skip locality, reducing peer-to-peer communication bottlenecks and achieving efficient training on GPU clusters.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对扩散模型训练中的流水线并行效率问题，提出PULSE自动流水线并行策略。通过将跳跃连接局部性作为一等优化目标，减少跨流水线边界的点对点通信瓶颈，从而加速UNet结构扩散模型的训练。实验证明该方法有效提升GPU集群训练效率，为大规模扩散模型训练提供了实用方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对扩散模型训练中的流水线并行效率问题，提出PULSE自动流水线并行策略。通过将跳跃连接局部性作为一等优化目标，减少跨流水线边界的点对点通信瓶颈，从而加速UNet结构扩散模型的训练。实验证明该方法有效提升GPU集群训练效率，为大规模扩散模型训练提供了实用方案。

quick_skim.title: Flow Map Denoisers: Traversing the Distortion-Perception Plane for Inverse Problems
quick_skim.abstract: Image restoration faces a fundamental tradeoff: methods that minimize error produce blurry reconstructions, while those that maximize perceptual quality yield sharp but less faithful images. Existing approaches either commit to a single operating point on this distortion perception (DP) frontier or require paired-data supervision, auxiliary models, or hyperparameter tuning of the sampler to access different points. We show that flow map models, a recent extension of flow matching for few-step sampling that learns an average field, implicitly define a one-parameter family of denoisers that continuously spans the DP frontier. The lookahead parameter t acts as a control knob between the MMSE and perceptual regimes. For Gaussian targets, we prove that varying t exactly recovers the optimal DP frontier; for natural images, we observe similar behavior empirically. Within a Plug-and-Play solver, the same mechanism extends to general inverse problems, where it controls a tradeoff between perceptual alignment and data consistency. Despite the lack of exact optimality guarantees in this setting, a single trained flow map spans the DP tradeoff, matching or exceeding specialized baselines at both extremes. Extensive experiments on CelebA ($128\times 128$) and AFHQ ($256\times 256$) across several linear and nonlinear inverse tasks validate our findings.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Flow map denoisers that traverse the distortion-perception plane, directly relevant to perceptual rate-distortion optimization
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 流图去噪器可遍历失真-感知平面，直接关联感知率失真优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 流图去噪器可遍历失真-感知平面，直接关联感知率失真优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 流图去噪器可遍历失真-感知平面，直接关联感知率失真优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Shows flow map denoisers define a one-parameter family spanning the DP frontier, enabling control of perceptual quality without extra models.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 现有图像复原方法难以同时优化失真和感知质量，该工作发现流图模型隐式定义了一个单参数族去噪器，可连续遍历失真-感知前沿。参数t作为控制旋钮，无需辅助模型即可在MMSE和感知最优之间平滑切换。该机制可直接应用于视频编码的感知率失真优化，为生成式视频编码提供了理论工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 现有图像复原方法难以同时优化失真和感知质量，该工作发现流图模型隐式定义了一个单参数族去噪器，可连续遍历失真-感知前沿。参数t作为控制旋钮，无需辅助模型即可在MMSE和感知最优之间平滑切换。该机制可直接应用于视频编码的感知率失真优化，为生成式视频编码提供了理论工具。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Perceptual rate distortion optimization for generative video coding

quick_skim.title: StreamKL: Fast and Memory-Efficient KL Divergence for Boosting Attention Distillation
quick_skim.abstract: Attention distillation, which trains one attention distribution to match another by minimizing their Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence, is widely used in knowledge distillation, model compression, continual learning, and sparse-attention LLM training. However, existing approaches materialize both attention distributions before computing the KL reduction, incurring $O(N_QN_K)$ memory and IO costs that become prohibitive at long context lengths. We present StreamKL, the first fused GPU primitive for attention KL divergence that eliminates this quadratic materialization. StreamKL derives a novel online formulation for the coupled two-distribution KL reduction, enabling a single one-pass forward kernel that streams query-key tiles through on-chip SRAM. For the backward pass, StreamKL recomputes attention probabilities tile-by-tile, avoiding storage of quadratic intermediates. We further design and implement efficient GPU kernels with dedicated optimizations. Experiments show StreamKL delivers up to $43\times$ and $14\times$ speedups over baseline methods in the forward and backward passes, respectively. Most importantly, StreamKL reduces the extra HBM footprint of attention distillation from $O(N_QN_K)$ to $O(1)$, enabling long-context distillation on a single GPU.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Memory-efficient KL divergence for attention distillation enables efficient knowledge transfer
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 高效KL散度的注意力蒸馏方法，可支持知识蒸馏策略
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 高效KL散度的注意力蒸馏方法，可支持知识蒸馏策略
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 高效KL散度的注意力蒸馏方法，可支持知识蒸馏策略
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: StreamKL is a fused GPU primitive for attention KL divergence that eliminates quadratic materialization, enabling efficient attention distillation for model compression and knowledge transfer.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 注意力蒸馏广泛用于知识蒸馏和模型压缩，但现有方法需要物化两个注意力分布，导致O(N_QN_K)内存和IO开销。本文提出StreamKL，首个融合GPU原语，通过在线推导双分布KL约简，实现单次前向传递，消除二次物化。该方法在长序列上大幅降低内存消耗，使得注意力蒸馏可扩展到长上下文，为视频压缩模型的知识蒸馏提供了高效工具。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 注意力蒸馏广泛用于知识蒸馏和模型压缩，但现有方法需要物化两个注意力分布，导致O(N_QN_K)内存和IO开销。本文提出StreamKL，首个融合GPU原语，通过在线推导双分布KL约简，实现单次前向传递，消除二次物化。该方法在长序列上大幅降低内存消耗，使得注意力蒸馏可扩展到长上下文，为视频压缩模型的知识蒸馏提供了高效工具。
